headlines.headline: Wrelal Financial sees 7% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 7% drop in new customer orders indicates a negative impact on future revenue and growth for Wrelal Financial.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
